definition:
1. to lighten  a ship by throwing out part of its cargo, (Herdotus Historicus): metaphorically, ἐπ. τοὺς πόνους to lighten  one's labours, (Xenophon Historicus):—;with genitive rei, to relieve of  a burden, (Euripides) 
2. to lift up, support , (Sophocles Tragicus): metaphorically to lift up, encourage , (Xenophon Historicus) (ML)
